esearchresult.querytranslation: ("interrupted time series"[Title] OR "difference-in-differences"[Title] OR "difference-in-differences"[Title] OR "event study"[Title] OR "synthetic control"[Title] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title] OR "instrumental variable"[Title] OR "target trial"[Title] OR "negative control"[Title]) AND ("Communicable Diseases"[MeSH Terms] OR "infection*"[Title/Abstract] OR "infectious"[Title/Abstract] OR "outbreak*"[Title/Abstract] OR "epidemic*"[Title/Abstract] OR "pathogen*"[Title/Abstract] OR "vaccin*"[Title/Abstract] OR "antimicrobial resistance"[Title/Abstract]) AND 2010/01/01:2026/12/31[Date - Publication]
